input_dict.question: What number of male band members do both Juliette and the Licks and Civil Twilight have?
input_dict.source_summary: Both bands have four other/named band members. Civil Twilight's four are explicitly male — "the brothers Andrew and Steven McKellar, plus Richard Wouters, and Kevin Dailey" (passage 2) — while the provided passage listing Juliette and the Licks' four members does not explicitly state those members' genders (passage 1).
input_dict.target_summary: Evidence summary: Juliette & The Licks — the page lists four other band members: guitarist Craig Fairbaugh, guitarist Emilio Cueto, bassist Jason Womack, and drummer Ed Davis. Civil Twilight — the page describes the group as a "four-piece" rock band consisting of the brothers Andrew and Steven McKellar, plus Richard Wouters and Kevin Dailey. Both sources therefore provide four named members for each band (Civil Twilight is explicitly called a four-piece; the Juliette & The Licks page names four other members).
input_dict.candidate_summary: Evidence summary: Juliette & The Licks — the page lists four other band members: guitarist Craig Fairbaugh, guitarist Emilio Cueto, bassist Jason Womack, and drummer Ed Davis. Civil Twilight — the page describes the group as a "four-piece" rock band consisting of the brothers Andrew and Steven McKellar, plus Richard Wouters and Kevin Dailey. Both sources therefore provide four named members for each band (Civil Twilight is explicitly called a four-piece; the Juliette & The Licks page names four other members).
